Amh Garanjy is not-so-subtly hinting that your help is needed to save this year's Starlight Celebration.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
You have pledged to aid Amh Garanjy and her helpers gather the messages that children have mistakenly placed at trees throughout the expansive Lavender Beds. Equip your Starlight tunic, and collect the letter recently left at the base of the Starlight sentinel in Yainu-Par.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.
